query:
-- Create wholesale_categories table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `wholesale_categories` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `name` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
  `slug` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
  `description` text,
  `imageUrl` text,
  `displayOrder` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `isActive` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT true,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT `wholesale_categories_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
  CONSTRAINT `wholesale_categories_slug_unique` UNIQUE(`slug`)
);

-- Create wholesale_products table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `wholesale_products` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `categoryId` int NOT NULL,
  `name` varchar(200) NOT NULL,
  `slug` varchar(200) NOT NULL,
  `description` text,
  `specifications` text,
  `imageUrl` text,
  `imageUrl2` text,
  `imageUrl3` text,
  `videoUrl` text,
  `basePrice` int NOT NULL,
  `unit` varchar(50) NOT NULL,
  `unitsPerCase` int,
  `pricingTiers` json,
  `stockQuantity` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `lowStockThreshold` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 10,
  `isActive` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT true,
  `isFeatured` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT false,
  `isTestData` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT false,
  `displayOrder` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT `wholesale_products_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
  CONSTRAINT `wholesale_products_slug_unique` UNIQUE(`slug`)
);

-- Create wholesale_customers table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `wholesale_customers` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `businessName` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `gstNumber` varchar(20),
  `businessType` enum('cafe', 'restaurant', 'retailer', 'distributor', 'caterer', 'other') DEFAULT 'other',
  `contactPerson` varchar(200) NOT NULL,
  `email` varchar(320) NOT NULL,
  `phone` varchar(20) NOT NULL,
  `addressLine1` text NOT NULL,
  `addressLine2` text,
  `city` varchar(100) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'Chennai',
  `state` varchar(100) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'Tamil Nadu',
  `pincode` varchar(10) NOT NULL,
  `passwordHash` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `isVerified` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT false,
  `isActive` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT true,
  `isTestData` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT false,
  `notes` text,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `lastLoginAt` timestamp,
  CONSTRAINT `wholesale_customers_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
  CONSTRAINT `wholesale_customers_email_unique` UNIQUE(`email`)
);

-- Create wholesale_cart table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `wholesale_cart` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `customerId` int NOT NULL,
  `productId` int NOT NULL,
  `quantity` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT `wholesale_cart_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

-- Create wholesale_orders table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `wholesale_orders` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `orderNumber` varchar(20) NOT NULL,
  `customerId` int NOT NULL,
  `businessName` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `gstNumber` varchar(20),
  `contactPerson` varchar(200) NOT NULL,
  `email` varchar(320) NOT NULL,
  `phone` varchar(20) NOT NULL,
  `pickupLocation` text,
  `subtotal` int NOT NULL,
  `cgst` int NOT NULL,
  `sgst` int NOT NULL,
  `totalGst` int NOT NULL,
  `totalAmount` int NOT NULL,
  `paymentStatus` enum('pending', 'paid', 'failed', 'refunded') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
  `paymentMethod` enum('razorpay', 'bank_transfer', 'cash') DEFAULT 'razorpay',
  `razorpayOrderId` varchar(100),
  `razorpayPaymentId` varchar(100),
  `orderStatus` enum('pending', 'confirmed', 'processing', 'ready', 'completed', 'cancelled') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
  `customerNotes` text,
  `adminNotes` text,
  `isTestData` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT false,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `completedAt` timestamp,
  CONSTRAINT `wholesale_orders_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
  CONSTRAINT `wholesale_orders_orderNumber_unique` UNIQUE(`orderNumber`)
);

-- Create wholesale_order_items table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `wholesale_order_items` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `orderId` int NOT NULL,
  `productId` int NOT NULL,
  `productName` varchar(200) NOT NULL,
  `unit` varchar(50) NOT NULL,
  `quantity` int NOT NULL,
  `unitPrice` int NOT NULL,
  `lineTotal` int NOT NULL,
  `isTestData` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT false,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT `wholesale_order_items_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

-- Create wholesale_password_resets table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `wholesale_password_resets` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `customerId` int NOT NULL,
  `token` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
  `expiresAt` timestamp NOT NULL,
  `usedAt` timestamp,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT `wholesale_password_resets_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
  CONSTRAINT `wholesale_password_resets_token_unique` UNIQUE(`token`)
);
